name: Keyboard Tennis
short_description: Keyboard Tennis, a keyboard-based tennis game, offers both fun and competitive experiences. Players aim to swiftly and accurately return the ball to their opponent using keyboard keys, requiring fast reflexes and precise timing.
detailed_description:
• Keyboard Tennis is a tennis game played on the keyboard. Players compete against their opponents just like in a real tennis match, but this time they move using the keyboard keys.
  • Players can engage in a tennis match against a computer-controlled opponent using the keyboard keys. Swift and accurate use of the keyboard keys is crucial for a successful game.
  • The game offers both fun and competitive experience. Players can compete against the computer to showcase their skills.
  • Players aim to swiftly and accurately return the ball to their opponent using keyboard keys. Fast reflexes and precise timing are the keys to becoming a successful player.
  • Keyboard Tennis provides players with an addictive experience with its simple game mechanics. Although it is easy to learn, mastering it may take time and keeps players engaged on the screen.

supported_languages: English, Turkish, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Azerbaijani
